creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #7)
> The not very smart current developers added .git to the release: [...]
> I have passed these questions on to the current developers.
Thanks.  Meanwhile, I think we can use GitHub's generated tarballs while developers fix their release process.  No need to resend the patch, the change should be rather trivial.
